mapper.sql: p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.view_count, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_deleted, p.deleted_at, p.is_blinded, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.created_by, p.updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = #{status} AND p.is_deleted = false ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_id, title, content, category, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, is_deleted, is_blinded, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, 0, 0, 0, false, false, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, is_blinded = #{isBlinded}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{delta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count + #{delta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p
mapper.sql: post_comment_id, post_id, category_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, content, is_deleted, like_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comment SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_comment_id = #{postCommentId}
UPDATE post_comment SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{delta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_comment_id = #{postCommentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (post_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO comment_likes (comment_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
